message:
Command `# Good. Now we can resume from step 25 (GlobalPlacement) by using --from flag
# First check if librelane supports --from
librelane --help 2>&1 | grep -E "\-\-from|\-\-to|\-\-start|\-\-resume" | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "# Good. Now we can resume from step 25 (GlobalPlacement) by using --from flag\n# First check if librelane supports --from\nlibrelane --help 2>&1 | grep -E \"\\-\\-from|\\-\\-to|\\-\\-start|\\-\\-resume\" | head -10"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
-F, --from TEXT                Start from a step with this id. Supported by
  -T, --to TEXT                  Stop at a step with this id. Supported by
  --only TEXT                    Shorthand to set both --from and --to to the

extras.command:
# Good. Now we can resume from step 25 (GlobalPlacement) by using --from flag
# First check if librelane supports --from
librelane --help 2>&1 | grep -E "\-\-from|\-\-to|\-\-start|\-\-resume" | head -10
